evals.prompt: I have a fitness app for iOS that helps people do home workouts. It's been on the App Store for 6 months but barely gets any organic downloads. Can you help me optimize my store listing? The metadata is in ./metadata/ and my main competitor is Nike Training Club.
evals.expected_output: Full ASO analysis report and prioritized plan with iOS-specific metadata optimization including cross-field keyword combination strategy and approval gate.

assertions.text: Produces a structured analysis report with app overview, metadata status table, and competitive findings
Includes categorized keyword tables (primary/secondary/long-tail) with volume estimates and rationale
Covers all iOS-specific metadata fields with character counts
Includes competitive analysis referencing Nike Training Club but does NOT use 'Nike Training Club' as a proposed keyword or in proposed metadata
Explains cross-field keyword combination strategy
Includes a store policy compliance check that scans for prohibited keywords, trademark violations, and listing policy issues
No proposed metadata contains prohibited terms (free, best, #1, top-rated) or competitor trademarks
Includes an explicit approval gate before execution

evals.prompt: We're launching a new meditation app on both iOS and Google Play next month. I need a complete ASO marketing plan. The app is called 'ZenMind' and it focuses on guided sleep meditation and stress relief. No existing metadata yet — starting from scratch.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive dual-platform ASO plan with platform-specific metadata, launch timeline, localization strategy, and visual asset guidance.

assertions.text: Has distinct sections for both Apple App Store AND Google Play with platform-specific metadata
iOS uses keywords field while Android emphasizes full description indexing
Addresses fresh-launch context with timeline and pre-launch steps
Includes localization strategy with priority markets
Targets meditation/sleep/stress relief with categorized keywords
Provides visual asset guidance (screenshots, icon, video)
Includes a policy compliance check validating proposed metadata against both Apple and Google Play store policies
No proposed metadata uses prohibited terms like 'best', 'free', '#1', or competitor trademarks like 'Headspace', 'Calm'

evals.prompt: My Android app is a budget tracker. It's getting decent downloads but the conversion rate from page views to installs is only about 15%. I think the store listing isn't convincing enough. Can you help improve the Google Play listing? Metadata is in fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/.
evals.expected_output: Conversion-focused ASO plan for Google Play with before/after metadata, above-the-fold optimization, and A/B testing recommendations.

assertions.text: Prioritizes conversion rate optimization as primary objective
Covers Google Play fields with correct character limits and indexing rules
Addresses above-the-fold optimization (first 1-3 lines)
Recommends A/B testing with Store Listing Experiments
Shows before/after metadata comparison with character counts
Includes visual asset recommendations for conversion
Validates proposed metadata against Google Play prohibited keywords (no 'top', 'best', '#1', 'free', 'download now', etc.) and trademark rules
